name: Potential Windows Software Discovery
notes: This rule triggers when a windows software is discovered. Adversaries may attempt to enumerate software for a variety of reasons, such as figuring out what security measures are present or if the compromised system has a version of software with a vulnerability.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Software Discovery, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Software Discovery - PowerShell
TD_list: APPLY Potential Windows Software Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Software Discovery, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Software Discovery - PowerShell
RED_list: Event name: Potential Windows Software Discovery

Event description: Detects a windows software is discovered. Adversaries may attempt to enumerate software for a variety of reasons, such as figuring out what security measures are present or if the compromised system has a version of software with a vulnerability.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
